== Notes for [[Item:Q111780|Q111780]] ==

Asura Asnurez1

b. circa 845?

Asura Asnurez was born circa 845?. She married Diego II Rodríguez "Porcelos", conde de Castilla, son of Rodrigo II Ramírez, conde de Castilla.1

Family

Diego II Rodríguez "Porcelos", conde de Castilla b. circa 852, d. 885

Children

Asura Díaz de Castilla+ b. c 865?1

Gutina Díaz de Castilla+ b. c 8721

Citations

[S1316] Reyes y Reinos Genealogias, online www.homar.org, España - 08.A.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
